S.FORM: Qaboos bin Said al Said 11 bulad 18 demiad, Qaboos bin Said al Said, u misingkiway. 1940 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Oman ayza sa ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, micakat a demiad sa i 1970 a mihca 7 bulad 23 demiad.
S.PHON: *aboos bin said ar~ɾ said ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, *aboos bin said ar~ɾ said, u misiŋkiwaj. **** a miħʦa nar~ɾəʦuħan) u tabakiaj a tapaŋ nu kanatar~ɾ (ʦoŋtuŋ) nu oman ajza sa ʦi *aboos bin said ar~ɾ said, miʦakat a dəmiad sa i **** a miħʦa * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad.
S.FORM: Qaboos bin Said al Said 11 bulad 18 demiad, Qaboos bin Said al Said, u misingkiway. 1940 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Oman ayza sa ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, micakat a demiad sa i 1970 a mihca 7 bulad 23 demiad.
S.PHON: *aboos bin said ar~ɾ said ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, *aboos bin said ar~ɾ said, u misiŋkiwaj. **** a miħʦa nar~ɾəʦuħan) u tabakiaj a tapaŋ nu kanatar~ɾ (ʦoŋtuŋ) nu oman ajza sa ʦi *aboos bin said ar~ɾ said, miʦakat a dəmiad sa i **** a miħʦa * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad.
